name: dnt-ivb-mapping-minerva-plugin
description: MINERVA v18+ plugin mapping DNT In-Vitro Battery (IVB) assays to map elements

scripts.build: mkdirp dist && npm run build-css && npm run babel && browserify -t browserify-css __tmp_minerva_plugin/js/index.js > dist/plugin.js && npm run clean-babel
scripts.build-debug: mkdirp dist && npm run build-css  && npm run babel && browserify -t browserify-css __tmp_minerva_plugin/js/index.js > dist/plugin.js && npm run clean-babel

author: Luiz Ladeira
